stories.title: Merino sends Spain to the semis, but La Roja need ...
stories.summary: You'd think a team boasting Lamine Yamal would score goals for fun, but to beat Belgium, Spain needed midfielder Mikel Merino to net the winner.

stories.title: World Cup recap: Merino delivers another late winn...
Sources: Bam struck Herro in Vegas altercation
stories.summary: Former Heat teammates Bam Adebayo and Tyler Herro got into a physical altercation at a practice court in a Las Vegas hotel on Friday morning during which Adebayo struck Herro, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Spain strike late to book WC semifinal with France...
stories.summary: In an outcome that felt inevitable for most of the game, Spain beat Belgium 2-1 with a late goal from a familiar face Friday.

stories.title: Ohtani (knee) scratched from start, to miss ASG
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani was scratched from his scheduled pitching start Friday due to continued irritation in his left knee
